SEARCH
Package graph

Class MulAgent

java.lang.Object
graph.BinOpAgent
graph.MulAgent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Agent
public class MulAgent extends BinOpAgent
An event-driven agent that performs binary multiplication on two input topics and publishes the result to an output topic.

Design Patterns and Implementation Details:

This class extends BinOpAgent, inheriting its registration, callback, and resource cleanup pathways. It specializes the processing behavior by supplying a binary multiplication lambda strategy ((x, y) -> x * y).

Execution Lifecycle:

Because this agent inherits the initialization pathways of BinOpAgent, its internal caches start as uninitialized (null). It requires distinct updates on both input topics (subs[0] and subs[1]) before executing and publishing its first output. Subsequent message arrivals on either topic trigger calculations using the last known value of the opposite topic.

Required Core Framework Components (Internal Dependencies):

  • BinOpAgent - The parent strategy-driven binary operator agent class.
  • TopicManagerSingleton - Directory service that handles the subscription and publication routing under the hood.

Code Integration Example:


 String[] subscriptions = { "factor_1", "factor_2" };
 String[] publications = { "multiplication_results" };
 
 // Create and register the multiplication agent
 MulAgent mulAgent = new MulAgent(subscriptions, publications);
 
 // Publish to inputs to trigger the calculation flow
 TopicManagerSingleton.get().getTopic("factor_1").publish(new Message(6.0));  // Cached
 TopicManagerSingleton.get().getTopic("factor_2").publish(new Message(7.0));  // Triggers output -> 42.0
 
 // Clean up resources when done
 mulAgent.close();
See Also:
  • BinOpAgent
  • TopicManagerSingleton

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MulAgent(String[] subs, String[] pubs)
    Constructs a MulAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics by delegating the registration and multiplication strategy to the BinOpAgent base class.

    Methods inherited from class graph.BinOpAgent

    callback, close, getName, reset

  • Constructor Details

    • MulAgent

      public MulAgent(String[] subs, String[] pubs)
      Constructs a MulAgent and registers it with the designated input and output topics by delegating the registration and multiplication strategy to the BinOpAgent base class. Throws an IllegalArgumentException during initialization if the structural requirements (at least 2 subscriptions and 1 publication) are not met.
      Parameters:
      subs - the subscription topics array (must contain at least 2 valid topics)
      pubs - the publication topics array (must contain at least 1 valid topic)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if subscription or publication arrays are null, empty, or if their required index elements are null.
